=====Released=====
{{main|N's Pokémon}}
These Pokémon were {{pkmn2|released}} by N at some point before the events of Black 2 and White 2. Once the player has used the [[Memory Link]] function to see a flashback of N releasing his Pokémon, they can encounter these Pokémon in the wild and catch them. The only exception to this is {{TP|N|Zorua}}, which can be received as a {{pkmn2|gift}} from [[Rood]] without the need to use Memory Link. Once caught, these Pokémon will have N as their [[Original Trainer]] and N's [[Trainer ID number]].
